title: Chapter 206
content:
Chapter 205

What the hell just happened?

Pshhh…

Is this… for real?

Pshhh…

Damn. This is mesmerizing.

Pshhh…

Even Elara was looking at her disciple strangely, and Valeira, who was usually so stoic, couldn’t hide the strange look in her eyes.

All because…

“Ahhungg!!”

“Huunngggjjjjgg!!!”

“HEEEUNNNGGG!!!”

When the hell is she going to stop?

The queen kept squirting and squirting. To the point, even I was worried she would be dehydrated.

But her squirting didn’t stop.

If anything, it increased, and by the time she was done, I was fully soaked from neck below, some trickles on my face as well, and the surrounding bed was fully soaked.

Elara and Valeria weren’t spared either, as the fountain of youth also assaulted them, although not like how it soaked me.

But damn…

[Ding]

[A yin compatible body has been detected]

[Absorbing all the essence released]

[The user’s bloodline is reacting]

[Some effects have been absorbed]

No wonder. Well, I could be sure for sure now that this wasn’t a usual occurrence. There was a reason behind this.

You see, there were women who were extremely compatible with yin energy and also practiced a yin-related art, which often required them to remain a virgin. For many, many years, such an energy accumulated in their navel, which is very close to their hymen and hence connected to it, and once you tear it, not only do they lose a good bit of their cultivation or accumulated energy, but they also release it in a rather explosive way.

In the case of the queen, it didn’t seem like she practiced a yin-based art, so it was her body that was yin type, and tearing her hymen, if at once like this, could have had the same result.

Of course, had it been done earlier in her life, or had her hymen been torn gradually, it wouldn’t have been explosive and spectacular like this, but since she was of considerable age, and had accumulated a lot of energy, well… the result was quite… again I say…

“Did something happen to her?” Elara asked, looking at her disciple, who was now heaving hard, panting like someone had sucked the life out of her.

“I think she is experiencing pleasure…?”

Even I wasn’t sure how to spin this. I mean, I was too flabbergasted by it. You see, the yin palace women, who were the only ones this could be experienced with, would lose their hymen at a young age, since they were also martial artists.

Sure, they were virgins, but just having a hymen didn’t mean a woman was a virgin.

No penetration was the final requirement of a girl being a virgin. In that sense, the women of the Yin Palace were virgins.

But since they didn’t have a hymen, such an explosive sight was something I had never witnessed before.

This, right before me right now, was a rare occasion that might not ever happen again in my life, or in all my lives.

Damn.

My dick throbbed like a madman.

“I think we should continue,” I said before the queen could come to her senses.

“I… I think you should…” Elara wasn’t sure either, but she gave me the go-ahead anyway, and that was all I needed.

“Hnngg~~!!”

The queen moaned as I moved, the cool sensation from earlier doing nothing about my pleasure, as it was just as tight and snug as before.

On the contrary, the cold sensation was making this a new experience I didn’t quite dislike.

“Hnnn~~”

“Ahhnn~~”

“Hmmm~~~”

The queen kept moaning, even if she didn’t know why she was making that sound, not because she was confused, but because she was still a little out of it.

Her pussy kept squirting, although not explosively like before, but the remnant yin energy was still coming out, and some of it was going through my dick, for some reason affecting my bloodline.

Didn’t know which one, though.

I kept the thrusting gentle and controlled. She was too weak to go hard and fast at her. It was better to go low and slow, keeping it still pleasurable, but not rough.

“Hnngg~~!”

“Aaaannh!!”

“HYAAANNHH!!!”

The queen came again, but this time, it was quite low in intensity. It wasn’t the same as before, but it was still quite a bit of squirt, again hitting the innocent bystanders, and soaking my navel.

[Sufficient energy has been absorbed]

[A hint to awakening your hidden bloodline would be provided]

The message blinked before my eyes, and I stopped for a second, but not for long, as I dismissed the message soon because Elizabeth's pussy clenched like crazy, turning my eyes towards her.

She was still somewhat half-conscious, but her pussy had started clamping down on me like crazy. Maybe it was on instinct, or she had just learned to do so, but a cold pussy clamping down on me wasn’t the kind of sensation I was quite used to.

“Hnnnnnnnnnnnhhh~~~”

Elizabeth’s back arched as she came again, bringing herself to an orgasm using my dick on instinct.

The only problem was that the tightness was too much for me, and add to that the unfamiliar cold sensation…

“Guh!”

I grunted and began to empty myself inside of her, my hips moving at the end in a violent thrust that rocked her entire body, lodging myself deep inside of her to the hilt, emptying my scorching hot reserves in her cold pussy.

The result?

“KKYGGNANANANAGGHHHGGHH!!!”

The mixture of yin and yang.

And once again…

“PSSSSSSHHHHHHH!!!!”

More violent, more intense than before, and so much juicier.

If my face had been saved earlier, this time it wasn’t.

If Elara and Valeria only had their arms soaked this time, this time they had a lot more soaked.

Even the bed behind me wasn’t spared.

Even the one squirting herself wasn’t spared.

But there wasn’t just nutty sweetness in this gush this time. There was something more. Something much more.

I couldn’t help but sniff the usual pungent smell of rotting flesh. She was not only relieving herself, but she was also expelling the impurities within her, and not only that, but there was also something else mixed in there.

Something I didn’t miss even if I wanted to, and someone else didn’t either.

Elara moved her free hand with precision, even among the squirting mess, and captured the dark mana that had expelled via the impurities before it could disperse in the natural mana in the atmosphere.

She caged the dark mana in a mana cube.

While she did so, the queen had stopped squirting. Her body was still twitching, quivering like it was going through shock therapy. The juices still squirted out of her, and now that my cock wasn’t connected to her, I wasn’t receiving anything.

Well, there wasn’t anything to receive anyway. She was expelling the filth accumulated in her body, not the pure yin energy.

The yin energy in her was being absorbed, and now that the impure waste blocking her was gone, the yin energy that had been stimulated by my scorching hot yang energy was rapidly going through her body, cleansing and empowering her.

‘Soon…’

It wasn’t long before the queen’s body began to glow. A chill spread through the whole room as her body became cold as ice.

Elara waved her hand, pulling both Valeria and me away from the queen as the frost energy accumulated in her.

It was quite a spectacle to see. Energy of frost, something that could be seen but could not be touched, like real frost or snow, created a barrier around her, absorbing the mana in the air, turning it into cold energy before supplying it to Elizabeth.

“This is…” Elara could only say so before she glanced at me, and it was such a stare that even if it was at the back of my head, I couldn’t miss it.

If it were anyone else, they would have thought I had done something to the queen. Valeria certainly seemed to think so, even if she didn’t say anything.

But Elara didn’t say anything. She was instead looking at me with something in her eyes. Even if I couldn’t see her, I could tell what it was.

Hunger.

Not the kind I would have liked from a sexy, muscular GILF like her, but the kind that ran a chill down my spine. The different kind of chill that was from the literal chill of frost in the room.

Luckily, before she could formulate any more plans in her mind on the spot, the queen’s body stopped absorbing mana.

As everything came to a stop, what was revealed slowly was a crystal of ice, a translucent crystal in which the queen seemed to be sleeping.

Her eyes were closed, her expression serene, and she looked like the sleeping beauty in fantasy stories, in an ice cube.

But then her eyes snapped open.

What was it? A chill down my spine?

Haha. No.

A literal snowstorm engulfed me.

I couldn’t believe what I was seeing until Elara, next to me, said…

“Finally… she broke through.”

She did what?
